# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

If you believe you've found a security issue in any project under
`github.com/fr33d0s`, please do **not** open a public issue.

Instead, report privately via GitHub's private vulnerability reporting
flow on the affected repository, or email `yapayzeka@vatanyazilim.com.tr`
with:

- a description of the vulnerability
- steps to reproduce
- the affected versions or commits

Expect an initial response within 72 hours.

## Supported versions

Public repositories default to the latest tagged release on the default
branch. Pinned older releases receive security fixes only if they are
still in active use by dependent projects.
